utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check full specification: 1) destination: specified as Athens, Greece — complete. 2) travel_dates: specified as October 15-19, 2024 — specific dates — complete. 3) transportation: includes type (Flight), details (Round-trip, Economy Class on a Budget Airline), and cost (120). While not airline/times, the format only required flight details with costs; sufficient — complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — name (Adventure Lodge), duration (4 nights), cost (220) — complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — two activities listed with names and costs — complete. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs — name, details, cost 0 — complete. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — shows confirmed_cost, max_budget, remaining — complete. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Athens, Greece), transportation as Budget Airline Economy Class, accommodation named Adventure Lodge, and two activities: Rock Climbing (called Full-day rock climbing session) and Scuba diving excursion. It also lists an additional service 'Equipment and Document Delivery' but this exact service is not present in the ground-truth ratings, so it cannot be mapped. For each item found in the ground-truth, I matched exact or clearly corresponding entries and pulled their ratings.
